reviews.review_description: Those accounts that are "reviews" fake as hell this game does not even deserve 1 star. The comments say this game is good but its not. Nothing close too club penguin and it is a discrace they would claim that. No game has ever made this upset unless if it was just me being bad at the game. Bad game chat terrible minigames. Unless if your making a video our wish to be raged play this if otherwise i highly recommend you dont

reviews.review_title: Don't even waste your time downloading
reviews.review_description: You can't make an account to use so you'd have to rely on using a guest account it's very buggy too icing on the cake is that they try to be funny and add adolfs name on here with the text when you get near him being "arts a lifestyle"

developer_response.body:
Hi, we checked the register account function and found no problem. Please check if it meets the registered user name and password rules?
If it still doesn't work, I hope you can join our discord, send me pictures or videos of the problem, and we will solve it as soon as possible.
Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: Won’t even load me in. Every time I try it does the opening cutscene and then it’s a black screen.

I have been unable to register with the game and so only able to play guest account, otherwise star rating would be higher.

From what I am able to play, I have fun. It is good to be silly and have a laugh at yourself once in a while.

developer_response.body:
Hi, we checked the register account function and found no problem. Please check if it meets the registered user name and password rules?
If it still doesn't work, I hope you can join our discord, send me pictures or videos of the problem, and we will solve it as soon as possible.
Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
the game is bad. controls are janky.
The graphics are ok, but the lack of gameplay leaves wanting.
don't bother downloading

developer_response.body: Hi, you can invite your friends or enter the game mode with strangers may be more fun, but we are still in the beta stage and will add more gameplay in the future, thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: This game is SOOOOOO good and it reminds me of club penguin

This game could use some polish but other than that it's great and super fun and easy to learn I've been playing it for days and I'm addicted and it's so much fun

what they need to add
1. More ways to play
2. More skins
3. More maps

This game deserves a 5 Star! This reminds me of club penguin I highly recommend you play this game and I saw a 1 star also it’s good some dude says it’s bad but it’s not a bad game imao? It is and good game also I repeat you play the game
The genre mashup of sports, graffiti, cartoons, first-person shooters is likely to be more in the future, and it's a lot of fun to play. You can get more character skins to dress up through

The first time I played this game, I was exhausted. Handball mode is just that, so much fun! I had to be so bad at shooting that I couldn't throw the ball into the rim every time, and then I just jumped right into it to score. The characters are cute too, and everyone's skins are fun. I didn't read the description, I just played a few games with my friends and everyone thought it was a great game. Well done, developers! love it!
